headline: Security Leaders Cite AI as a Risk Multiplier for APIs in New Akamai Survey
summary: API attacks and incident costs surge alongside AI adoptionCAMBRIDGE, Mass., April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) today released new research showing that organizations are rushing to deploy APIs without adequate security or testing, leaving them vulnerable to attacks once released. Now in its fourth year, the Akamai API Security Impact Survey examines the state of API protection based on a global survey of 1,840 security professionals across 6 industries and 10 countries. The
